race.description: Hops & Hooves Festival 26 September Mdn Hcp
race.comment: HOLD MY DRINK (1) just missed in a photo finish two back before failing on the heavy deck last time out at Kembla. Back to a more suitable race today and he looks to get every chance. Can land the knockout blow this time around. OLIVIA MIA (4) looks as though she'll appreciate coming back to an easier maiden this time around. She's shown good talent at the trials, but hasn't translated that to the races just yet. Today could be the day in what looks a very suitable race. MAGNANAMOUS (6) stuck on well over the shorter course here last time out and should appreciate getting out in distance today. Can play a leading role. THE BUS (11) can resume on a positive note. ACQUARO (5) is better than he showed last start and won't be far away.
